name: CLI Workbench
description: Reference plugin: publish CLI JSON or lines as a Qx-rendered declarative Workbench.
author: Qx

preferences.label: Custom program
preferences.description: Bare name or absolute path for the Custom tab. Leave blank for the platform default.

preferences.label: Custom args (space-separated)
preferences.description: Arguments passed to the custom program. Leave blank with the platform default.

commands.name: demo-json-toast
commands.title: Demo: CLI JSON toast
commands.description: Run a portable argv command that prints JSON and toast the count
